fact_nuggets.text: Light Metal (Japanese: Light Metal) is an Ability introduced in Generation V.

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Halves the weight of the Pokemon with this Ability, rounded down to the nearest tenth (e.g., Metang , normally weighing 202.5 kg, will weigh 101.2 kg if it has Light Metal). Autotomize is applied before other weight-modifying effects, including Light Metal. A Pokemon's weight cannot be reduced below 0.1 kg. This has no effect on the Heavy Ball , which uses the Pokemon's species' weight rather than its current weight. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Light Metal has no effect outside of battle.
